category_sources: source_facts.description: Provides shell scripts with access to kqueue(3); official FreeBSD man page describes waiting for file or directory changes.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name: wait_on; official FreeBSD man page name is wait_on.
docs_sources: Official FreeBSD manual page is the authoritative documentation for wait_on usage and options.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; no official source-control project URL was established from official sources. source_facts.homepage points to a FreshPorts/package page, not an upstream source-control repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description mentions shell scripts and kqueue(3); official FreeBSD man page describes waiting for file or directory changes without polling.
